category_sources: official repository README describes PCB as a CAD program for printed circuit board design
source_facts.description says interactive printed circuit board editor
display_name_sources: official repository README uses the project name Pcb/PCB
docs_sources: official repository README points users to doc/pcb.pdf for additional information

repo_sources: gEDA download/source notes identify the PCB git repository; repo.or.cz mirror lists this GitHub URL as the repository URL
